faq.title: Accounting questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about managing your books.

items.question: Do I need accounting knowledge to use this?
items.answer: Not at all! Invoicemonk Accounting is designed for business owners, not accountants. We handle the complexity behind the scenes while giving you clear, simple views of your finances.

items.question: How does this connect to invoicing?
items.answer: When you create invoices, payments, and expenses in Invoicemonk, they automatically flow into your accounting. No double entry, no reconciliation headaches.

items.question: Can I use this with my existing accountant?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can invite your accountant to view your books, and export reports in formats they're familiar with. We make their job easier too.

items.question: What financial reports can I generate?
items.answer: You'll be able to generate profit & loss statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, accounts receivable/payable aging, and custom reports for tax purposes.

items.question: Is this suitable for larger businesses?
items.answer: Yes! Our accounting features scale with your business. Multi-entity support, team permissions, and advanced reporting are available for growing businesses.

items.question: Can I set up different roles for my team?
items.answer: Yes. Invoicemonk supports role-based access control with Finance, Sales, and Executive roles. Each role has appropriate permissions so team members see only what they need, keeping your financial data secure.

seoFaqs.question: What is small business accounting software?
seoFaqs.answer: Small business accounting software helps you track income and expenses, generate financial reports, manage invoices, and stay tax-compliant — all without needing an accounting degree. It automates bookkeeping tasks that would otherwise require manual spreadsheets.

seoFaqs.question: Do I need an accountant if I use accounting software?
seoFaqs.answer: For day-to-day bookkeeping, accounting software can handle most tasks. However, for complex tax situations, year-end filings, or strategic financial planning, working with an accountant is recommended. The software makes their job easier by keeping your records organized.

seoFaqs.question: What financial reports can I generate?
seoFaqs.answer: You can generate profit and loss statements, balance sheets, cash flow reports, expense summaries, and tax-ready reports. These reports give you a clear picture of your business financial health at any time.

seoFaqs.question: How does accounting software help with taxes?
seoFaqs.answer: Accounting software maintains organized, categorized records throughout the year, automatically tracks tax-deductible expenses, and generates reports in formats accepted by tax authorities. This makes tax filing faster and reduces the risk of errors or missed deductions.
